name: finite-N chimera collapse-time campaign
description: Time-to-collapse distributions vs oscillator count N for the two-population Sakaguchi-Kuramoto chimera (identical-omega, delta-omega=0), with right-censoring. Dynamics-only; no audio. Reproduces the shipped src/audio/chimera.ts integrator (verified bit-identical by integrator.crosscheck.test.ts).

model._dt_note: dt=0.05 is the shipped control-rate step (orchestrator DRIFT_DT). t_max=2000s chosen from pilot runs so N=4-16 collapse almost entirely uncensored (max observed lifetime ~223s); generous margin, early-exit makes it free for collapsing runs.

criterion._note: Collapse = min(R1,R2) > theta sustained for W seconds. theta=0.85 is the shipped supervisor INCOH_LO, just above the ~0.83 healthy-breathing envelope; W=5s >> the breath's fast phase. Robustness shown in cp2_robustness.
